title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates rebuilding an autonomous codebase system to combine Claude Opus for deep reasoning with Kimi K2.6 for implementation tasks. The approach allocates expensive reasoning models only to steps where stronger reasoning improves outcomes while keeping implementation work on a faster, cheaper model to maintain token efficiency at scale.
